title: SAP FICO Consultant
description:
Your career at NTT DATA Business Solutions

Empowering You – to feel our passion for SAP / Analytic Solutions

As NTT DATA Business Solutions, we are more than just a company. We are a team of innovative and passionate people who specialize in creating value-added SAP and Analytic solutions and guiding our customers on their journey to becoming intelligent businesses. We focus on SAP Consulting, SAP Development, Data Analytics, Managed Cloud Services, Application Management Services (AMS) & Technology and beyond.

Our success is based on TOGETHERNESS, INNOVATION, TRUST, and SUSTAINABILITY – this is the heart of our corporate culture.

As part of the global NTT DATA Group, one of the top 10 IT service providers worldwide, we stand for our open and sustainable acting. More than 15,000 employees from 64 nations in over 30 countries show that diversity is integral to our DNA and that we live tolerance and respect every day.

People are the key to our success. We believe that every individual can make an important contribution and are therefore constantly on the lookout for talented people who can actively strengthen our team.

Are you ready to break new ground?

Key Responsibilities:

·       The Consultant is primarily responsible for providing business solutions and specialized in FICO and SAP Solution expertise to effectively integrate SAP Solutions into the client’s business environment in order to achieve the client expected business results.

·       Lead and advise the team member about Industry/ Business Best Practices

·       Carry out requirements gathering

·       Provide consulting services to internal/ external teams based on expertise and experience to address client needs

·       To identify, advise and translate the business requirement into the implementable design and meet defined customer needs, adhere to corporate standards & direction within constraints of cost, security and sustainability

·       Advise or carry out testing. Testing embraces the planning, designing, managing, executing, and report of tests, using appropriate techniques that conform to agreed project standards

·       Advise or carry out training. Training embraces the planning, designing, managing, execute of Training

·       To facilitate logical integration testing with other related SAP modules and interfaces to verify end-to-end business process.

·       To prepare and conduct project handover to the Support Consultant

·       Assist in architect a solution for positioning consulting services to an external customer or Internal affiliate partner

·       Support clients in the selection, implementation, and support of SAP FICO.

·       This role uses consulting skills, industry/ business knowledge

Requirement:

·       Degree in Computer Science / Computer Engineering / Information Technology related field or IT equivalent

·       6 - 12 years of SAP implementation experience, within multiple end-to-end implementations (around 2 large projects or 4-10 medium projects)

·       3 - 8 years’ experience in GL, AR, AP, Fixed Asset, and banking interfaces (two ways). Have strong integration knowledge on OTC and P2P processes. Have strong experience in account determination and business models of intercompany transactions

·       3-8 years’ experience in CO-PA, CO-PCA, Cost Center, Project Accounting, and Internal Order accounting. 2-4 projects with product costing experience

·       SAP IDOC design, testing, and processing experience

·       Experience in implementing using Activate methodology, i.e., Blueprint (including detailed design), Realization (including configuration, testing, data migration, training), Final Prep & Cutover

·       Experience in running workshops and facilitation

·       Strong documentation experience (especially functional specifications)

·       Strong issues resolution experience

·       Able to work in a team and on their own

·       Take full ownership and responsibility for the stream deliverables, including integration points with other modules and teams

·       Knowledge or experience in S/4 HANA Enterprise Management & Cloud ALM is a plus.

·       Experience or certification in SAP Cloud ERP implementation is an advantage.

·       Knowledge or hands-on experience in the pharmaceutical industry is preferred.

·       Understanding of SOX (Sarbanes–Oxley) compliance requirements, including internal controls over financial reporting and audit readiness, is an advantage.

postedCompany.description:
NTT DATA Business Solutions is a business unit of NTT DATA Corporation — a top 10 global IT services company. NTT DATA was established in 1967 as Data Communication Headquarter of Nippon Telegraph and Telephone Public Corporation.


Today with business operations in more than 50 countries, NTT DATA Business Solutions offers a powerful, unified combination of businesses delivering full-service solutions globally, providing premier professional services from consulting, system development to business IT outsourcing.


At NTT DATA Business Solutions, we design, implement, manage and continuously enhance solutions to make them work for companies – and for their people.
postedCompany.name: NTT DATA BUSINESS SOLUTIONS SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
